title: Article

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

author.description: The user who created the article.

last_edited_by.description: The user to last update the article.

visibility.description:
The visibility of the article.

* `PUBLIC` - PUBLIC
* `INTERNAL` - INTERNAL
* `RESTRICTED` - RESTRICTED

article_content_download_url.description: The presigned S3 URL to fetch article content.

checksum.description: The SHA256 checksum of the article content.

article_url.description: The URL to the webpage of the article.

status.description:
The status of the article.

* `DRAFT` - DRAFT
* `PUBLISHED` - PUBLISHED
* `ARCHIVED` - ARCHIVED
* `TRASH` - TRASH

type.description:
The type of the article.

* `PAGE` - PAGE
* `BLOG_POST` - BLOG_POST
* `SMART_LINK` - SMART_LINK

remote_created_at.description: When the third party's article was created.

remote_updated_at.description: When the third party's article was updated.

parent_article.description: The parent article an article is nested within.

parent_container.description: The parent container an article is nested within.

root_container.description: The top-level container in the hierarchy that holds this article. This will reference a container object that will typically be a SPACE or WORKSPACE type.

remote_was_deleted.description: Indicates whether or not this object has been deleted in the third party platform. Full coverage deletion detection is a premium add-on. Native deletion detection is offered for free with limited coverage. [Learn more](https://docs.merge.dev/integrations/hris/supported-features/).

description:
# The Article Object
### Description
The `Article` object is used to represent a form of content in the knowledge base, such as an article or page.
### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET /api/knowledgebase/articles` endpoint and view their articles.
